## Audience

Who is this documentation for?

Examples:

- Brand-new user trying the mock demo
- Engineer integrating a provider
- Operator inspecting traces and evals
- Contributor creating a workflow

## User Job

What should the reader understand or accomplish after reading this?

## Current Gap

What is unclear, missing, outdated, or too hard to discover?

## Proposed Change

- 
- 
- 

## Documentation Area

- [ ] README walkthrough
- [ ] CLI examples
- [ ] API examples
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Provider setup
- [ ] Trace/eval guide
- [ ] Workflow recipe
- [ ] Production readiness
- [ ] Screenshots or terminal captures
- [ ] Other

## Examples Or Assets Needed

List any CLI output, API responses, screenshots, diagrams, sample traces, or demo data needed.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Commands are copy-pasteable
- [ ] Output examples match current behavior
- [ ] Public-safe examples only
- [ ] Screenshots or terminal captures are current where applicable
- [ ] Docs link to related README, architecture, or workflow pages
